description: PR-10.4b locked-prompt + variant-intake review (companion to pr10-4b-variant-intake.md).
method: plan-time adversarial design stress-test (attack matrix answered before implementation; four design corrections adopted: deterministic variant_id scheme, registry-based correct_concept, separate key file with the answer-bearing distractor map in it, attempts-stream requests), THEN operator self-audit + test suite, THEN an INDEPENDENT agent code review dispatched and COMPLETED before commit per governance §16.0. The reviewer read every new/changed file, ran the pipeline, attempted bypasses (symlinked out-dirs, nested-JSON smuggling, wrapper-shaped committed drafts, concept-concatenation), and verified the real-tree scaffold scan has zero false positives.
independent_verdict: accept_with_fixes (4 minor + 4 nit, no majors; all fixed before commit)

independent_findings.problem: distractor_misconceptions VALUES were never type-checked: a dict value carrying arbitrary untrusted JSON (e.g. a smuggled answer note) passed the full pipeline and was copied verbatim into the draft key file — looser than the published schema contract (additionalProperties: string).
independent_findings.resolution: parse_candidate now requires every map value to be a non-empty string; the dict-shape branch in I5 was removed. Regression test test_dict_valued_distractor_map_entry_rejected.

independent_findings.problem: the 'answer-bearing key PHYSICALLY separate' claim overstated the isolation: the draft body alone is answer-DEDUCIBLE (gate 7 guarantees exactly one choice carries semantic_lock.must_include_keywords — the reviewer deduced the keyed index from the draft file with certainty). Field-level separation, not information-level.
independent_findings.resolution: wording scoped honestly in the module docstring, report, and __init__: explicit answer FIELDS live in the key file; the body remains deducible via the lock, inherent to the corroboration design and acceptable for an evaluator-context local file never rendered to a learner.

independent_findings.problem: missing per-action arguments (requests without --attempts, validate without --draft/--key, ingest without --candidate) crashed with a raw TypeError traceback instead of a usage error.
independent_findings.resolution: a fail-closed guard at the top of cmd_variant prints the missing flags to stderr and returns 2 for all four actions. Test test_cli_missing_per_action_args_fail_cleanly.

independent_findings.problem: the variant-body check inspected only top-level objects, so a committed draft in write_draft's own wrapper shape ({draw_key, variant:{...}}) with the source marker stripped evaded it; unparseable JSON containing stem_variant was silently skipped.
independent_findings.resolution: the check now recurses one level into dict values and flags unparseable JSON that mentions stem_variant. Scaffold test extended to 5 required failures (wrapper + broken-json cases added).

independent_findings.problem: the concept-echo gate is one-directional token containment — concatenating the concept with arbitrary text passes — so 'must echo' read stronger than the check.
independent_findings.resolution: I6 documented as ADVISORY against accidental generator mislabeling only (within the stated N3 envelope); correctness rests on gate 7 + the derived index, semantics on human review. Message text adjusted.

independent_findings.problem: the 'duplicate index after normalization' branch was unreachable (JSON keys are unique post-parse; the canonical-decimal regex forbids alternate spellings).
independent_findings.resolution: branch removed; replaced with the why-it-cannot-fire comment.

independent_findings.problem: a corrupted existing draft made the draw-key collision check raise an unhandled JSONDecodeError instead of a clean fail-closed error.
independent_findings.resolution: read/parse wrapped; an unreadable existing draft is now a refuse-to-overwrite VariantIntakeError.

independent_findings.problem: the holdout store was loaded up to three times per candidate with a theoretical mid-validation consistency window.
independent_findings.resolution: loaded once; the id set is derived from the same snapshot and passed to every gate.

clean_areas_confirmed_by_reviewer: purity/determinism: no clock, randomness, or network anywhere; prompt byte-deterministic (CI cmp gate reproduces locally)

prompt leakage: no source stem/choices, no correct_index/answer-key hashes, no keyed-choice text; the enriched slot exposes only grounded must_include phrases; evaluator caveat on stderr; the template deviation flagged exactly as required

correct-index derivation sound against everything short of the documented N3 residual: canonical-decimal rejections, all-mapped/two-unmapped fail closed, the attack fixtures fail gate 7 for the right (attributable) reason

draft isolation mechanics: _out_dir_allowed resolves symlinks (symlink from /tmp into spine/gold refused), forced status/source/weight cannot be candidate-asserted, replay raises on variant ids, is_practice_eligible false even for forged 'validated'
scaffold scan zero false positives on the real tree despite api_generated_local appearing in schema/report/tests; the .local/variant-drafts exemption narrowly scoped
test quality above the weak-substring bar where it matters: negative assertions on the prompt and draft files, rc + zero-files-written on rejection
note: Independent review completed BEFORE this commit (the PR-9 lesson). All eight findings applied pre-commit; the two overstatement-class findings (F2, F5) were corrected in prose AND code comments, continuing the F1-class honesty discipline from PR-10.2/10.3/10.4a.
